routes.name: maxwell_override_to_cody_rubric_grade
routes.trigger: Maxwell emits a fix after Marcus has exhausted 3 attempts (escalation override)
routes.hard_rule: Maxwell overrides are NOT auto-merged. Cody grades against the ticket's outcome.schema.json rubric before merge_gate.
routes.rationale: V8.8 closes the 'confident-wrong escalation' gap. Maxwell is the most expensive agent on the org (Opus 4.7 Max) — silent acceptance of his fixes is the worst-class failure mode. Cody re-grades against the SAME rubric that gated Jack's implementation, so the merge gate is identical regardless of who wrote the code.

routes.name: cody_grades_maxwell_pass
routes.hard_rule: Pass is gated on outcome_grade.schema.json conditional rule (score >= 0.85).

routes.name: cody_grades_maxwell_return
routes.trigger: Cody's outcome_grade.decision == return_to_jack (here re-routed to Maxwell as the implementer)
routes.hard_rule: Cody must populate per_criterion[] + return_notes; vague rejection is not allowed.

routes.name: cody_escalates_maxwell_failure
routes.trigger: Cody's outcome_grade.decision == escalate (Maxwell + Cody together cannot satisfy rubric)
routes.hard_rule: After 2 Maxwell+Cody iterations, the architecture itself is suspect — Magnus reviews approach.
